login.title: Member Login
login.rightQuote: Join the leading watersports community in Urla. Access your progress, book sessions, and manage your membership with UKC.

errors.networkError: Could not reach server. Check your connection.
errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.

profile.title: Rider Profile
profile.subtitle: Help us find the right gear for you

address.title: Your Location
address.subtitle: Where should we ship your orders?

hints.currency: All prices and payments will be processed in this currency
hints.shipping: Your address will be used as the default delivery address for shop orders. You can always change it at checkout.

validation.passwordPattern: Need uppercase, lowercase, number & special char (@$!%*?&)
validation.ageTooYoung: Must be at least 10 years old

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait before trying again.
forgotPassword.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

sent.title: Check Your Email
sent.body: If an account exists with {{email}}, you will receive a reset link shortly.
sent.didntReceiveBody: Check your spam folder or verify you entered the correct address. The link expires in 1 hour.

success.title: Success!
success.body: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.

invalid.title: Link Invalid
invalid.defaultBody: This password reset link has expired or is invalid.
invalid.expiry: Reset links expire after 1 hour for security reasons.

errors.invalidLink: Invalid password reset link. Please request a new one.
errors.expiredLink: This password reset link has expired or is invalid. Please request a new one.
errors.validateFailed: Unable to validate reset link. Please try again later.
errors.resetFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
errors.resetGenericFailed: Unable to reset password. Please try again later.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
errors.passwordMinValidation: Password must be at least 8 characters
